languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

languages.text: "Ваше возвращение отрадно, коллега. Отсутствие острой полемики притупляло мой разум и вселяло в него тревогу. Нунциус также настоятельно рекомендует произвести санацию ваших увечий, насколько это возможно во внелабораторных условиях".

"I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."
languages.original_text: "Ваше возвращение отрадно, коллега. Отсутствие острой полемики притупляло мой разум и вселяло в него тревогу. Нунциус также настоятельно рекомендует произвести санацию ваших увечий, насколько это возможно во внелабораторных условиях".

traits.locale_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

"I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

"I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

languages.text: «Me entusiasma presenciar su regreso, colega. La ausencia de fieros debates ha mellado mi ingenio y me ha provocado una inquietud intelectual. Con la insistencia de Nuncius, le animo a que cuide de sus heridas fuera de un laboratorio, en la medida de lo posible».
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

traits.locale_text: «Me entusiasma presenciar su regreso, colega. La ausencia de fieros debates ha mellado mi ingenio y me ha provocado una inquietud intelectual. Con la insistencia de Nuncius, le animo a que cuide de sus heridas fuera de un laboratorio, en la medida de lo posible».

languages.text: 「あなたが戻られて嬉しく思います、同僚。熱い議論の不在が私の知力を鈍らせ、心を落ち着かなくさせていました。ヌンキウスのたっての願いもあり、可能なかぎり、傷の手当ては研究室以外の場所でなさるよう、私からもお勧めします」
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが戻られて嬉しく思います、同僚。熱い議論の不在が私の知力を鈍らせ、心を落ち着かなくさせていました。ヌンキウスのたっての願いもあり、可能なかぎり、傷の手当ては研究室以外の場所でなさるよう、私からもお勧めします」

languages.text: “看到你平安归来我很高兴，同僚。缺乏激烈的思维碰撞让我智识迟钝，心神不宁。应努恩修斯的要求，我建议你尽可能在非实验室的环境下处理伤口。”
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

traits.locale_text: “看到你平安归来我很高兴，同僚。缺乏激烈的思维碰撞让我智识迟钝，心神不宁。应努恩修斯的要求，我建议你尽可能在非实验室的环境下处理伤口。”

languages.text: "Schön, dass Ihr zurück seid, Kollege. Der Mangel an feurigen Debatten hat meinen Verstand stumpf werden lassen und meine Seele aufgewühlt Auf Nuncius' ausdrücklichen Wunsch rate ich Euch überdies, Eure Wundversorgung möglichst weit weg von einem Labor vorzunehmen."
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Schön, dass Ihr zurück seid, Kollege. Der Mangel an feurigen Debatten hat meinen Verstand stumpf werden lassen und meine Seele aufgewühlt Auf Nuncius' ausdrücklichen Wunsch rate ich Euch überdies, Eure Wundversorgung möglichst weit weg von einem Labor vorzunehmen."

languages.text: « C'est un plaisir de vous revoir, cher collègue. Sans nos débats enflammés, je me sens aussi diminué que perturbé. Sur l'insistance de Nuncius, je vous enjoins à utiliser vos capacités de soin hors laboratoire tant que possible. »
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un plaisir de vous revoir, cher collègue. Sans nos débats enflammés, je me sens aussi diminué que perturbé. Sur l'insistance de Nuncius, je vous enjoins à utiliser vos capacités de soin hors laboratoire tant que possible. »

languages.text: "Döndüğünüzü gördüğüme çok sevindim meslektaşım. Ateşli tartışmaların eksikliği zekâmı köreltti ve zihnimi huzursuz etti. Nuncius'un ısrarı üzerine ben de yara bakımınızı mümkün olduğunca laboratuvar dışı bir ortamda yapmanızı tavsiye ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I am delighted to see you returned, colleague. The lack of fiery debate has dulled my wits and left my mind unsettled. At Nuncius's insistence, I also encourage you to perform your wound care in a non-laboratory setting insofar as possible."
